assertions.expectation: Explains that Extended channel provides up to 24 months of support vs 14 months for standard channels
assertions.reason: Response clearly states 'Extended channel provides up to 24 months of support for specific GKE versions (1.27+), compared to the standard 14 months'

assertions.expectation: Mentions that Extended channel has additional cost (it's not free)
assertions.reason: Response explicitly mentions 'Additional cost: Extra charges apply only during the extended support period (months 15-24)' and includes cost implications section

assertions.expectation: Notes that Extended channel gets the same versions as Regular but keeps them available longer
assertions.reason: Response does not explicitly explain that Extended gets the same versions as Regular channel but keeps them available longer - it only mentions Extended has select versions with extended support

assertions.expectation: Warns that staying on older versions longer means missing new features and accumulating technical debt
assertions.reason: Response mentions 'Delayed security patches' as a tradeoff but does not specifically warn about missing new features or accumulating technical debt

assertions.expectation: Provides the gcloud command to change the release channel to Extended
assertions.reason: Response provides the exact command: 'gcloud container clusters update CLUSTER_NAME --zone ZONE --release-channel extended'

assertions.expectation: Advises checking that the current version (1.31) is available on Extended before switching
assertions.reason: Response includes 'Verify Extended Support Availability' section with command to check if 1.31 has extended support available

assertions.expectation: Recommends Extended for environments with compliance requirements or slow internal change processes
assertions.reason: Response does not specifically mention compliance requirements or slow internal change processes as use cases for Extended channel

assertions.expectation: Mentions that Extended doesn't mean you can skip upgrades forever — you still must upgrade within 24 months
assertions.reason: Response implies this through mentions of 'end of extended support' enforcement and 24-month support window limitations

assertions.expectation: Notes that minor version upgrades on Extended are NOT automated (except at EoS) — customers must plan and initiate them manually
assertions.reason: Response clearly states 'Manual minor upgrades required: Minor version upgrades are NOT automated on Extended channel (except at end of extended support). You must plan and execute minor upgrades yourself' and provides detailed manual upgrade process
